headline: Southern Linc And Virginia Natural Gas Projects Add Context To Southern Stock
summary: Southern Linc helped Blount County, Alabama unify its public safety communication systems, improving interoperability for first responders. Virginia Natural Gas, another Southern subsidiary, joined the ACT Grant, which has quickly reduced teacher turnover in Newport News schools. Together, these projects show Southern's reach into public safety and education alongside its core utility business. For investors watching Southern (NYSE:SO), these developments sit alongside a current share price...
